creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Ability to create shared libs has been fixed. 
/usr/incliude/g++ is *NOT*! the place to get the C++ headers.  They are 
customized for G++ version 2.7.x.  If you need the std C++ lib to use with 
G++ version 2.8.x, install the glibstdlib++ port in ports/lang/
